scripts.build:packages: for pkg in core agent llm session index tools extensions search tui web-ui slack-bot pods rpc; do bun build packages/$pkg/src/index.ts --target=bun --outdir=dist/$pkg; done && bun build packages/cli/src/main.ts --target=bun --outdir=dist/cli
scripts.artifacts:print: bun -e "import { readdirSync, existsSync } from 'node:fs'; console.log(JSON.stringify({dist: existsSync('dist') ? readdirSync('dist').sort() : []}, null, 2));"
scripts.test: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test:unit && bun run test:conformance && bun run test:integration && bun run test:e2e && bun run test:fuzz && bun run test:bench
scripts.ci:smoke: bun run build && bun run test && bun run artifacts:print
